title: Park Avenue is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Park Avenue is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate E-commerce Executive with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Gurgaon is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!
